indicator.title: Indicator

mcp_tools.name: get_indicator

mcp_tools.description: Get details about a liquidity pool: price, tick, liquidity, volume, fees, TVL.

inputSchema.description: Get details about a liquidity pool.

fee_tier.description: Pool fee tier in hundredths of a bip (e.g. 500, 3000, 10000)
fee_tier.title: Fee Tier

pool_address.description: Explicit pool contract address (bypasses computed address)
pool_address.title: Pool Address

mcp_tools.name: get_pool_state

mcp_tools.description: Get details about an existing LP position: range, liquidity, accrued fees.

inputSchema.description: Get details about an existing LP position.

position_id.description: NFT token ID of the LP position
position_id.title: Position Id

inputSchema.title: GetLPPositionRequest

mcp_tools.name: get_lp_position

mcp_tools.description: List all Uniswap V3-style LP positions owned by a wallet (compact summary per position).

inputSchema.description:
List all LP positions owned by a wallet.

Iterates NonfungiblePositionManager.tokenOfOwnerByIndex(owner, i) for
i in [0, balanceOf(owner)). Returns a compact summary per position so
operators can pick a tokenId without drilling into `get_lp_position`.

include_empty.description: Include positions with zero liquidity (default: skip burned/fully-withdrawn positions).
include_empty.title: Include Empty

wallet_address.description: Wallet to query. Defaults to strategy wallet.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

inputSchema.title: ListLPPositionsRequest

mcp_tools.name: list_lp_positions

mcp_tools.description: List a wallet's lending positions with account-level totals and health factor (Aave V3).

inputSchema.description:
List lending positions for a wallet on a supported protocol.

v1: Aave V3 only. Returns account-level totals + health factor via
Pool.getUserAccountData(user). Per-reserve drill-down is a future
extension.

wallet_address.description: Wallet to query. Defaults to strategy wallet.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

inputSchema.title: ListLendingPositionsRequest

mcp_tools.name: list_lending_positions

mcp_tools.description: Aggregate a wallet's on-chain state: native + ERC20 balances, LP positions, lending.

inputSchema.description:
Summarize a wallet's on-chain positions on a single chain.

Combines native balance, ERC20 balances (via batch_get_balances for
common symbols or a caller-supplied list), LP positions, and lending
positions.

tokens.description: ERC20 symbols to include in the balance snapshot (e.g. ['USDC', 'WETH']).
tokens.title: Tokens

wallet_address.description: Wallet to query. Defaults to strategy wallet.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

inputSchema.title: GetPortfolioRequest

mcp_tools.name: get_portfolio

deployer_address.description: EOA address that signs the factory deploy tx
deployer_address.title: Deployer Address

underlying_token_address.description: Address of the vault's underlying token (e.g. USDC)
underlying_token_address.title: Underlying Token Address

valuation_manager_address.description: Address that can propose vault valuations (defaults to admin_address)
valuation_manager_address.title: Valuation Manager Address

mcp_tools.name: deploy_vault

inputSchema.title: GetVaultStateRequest

mcp_tools.name: get_vault_state

inputSchema.description: Run a vault settlement cycle (propose + settle deposits/redeems).

new_total_assets.description: Override NAV in raw underlying units; auto-computed if omitted
new_total_assets.title: New Total Assets

inputSchema.title: SettleVaultRequest

mcp_tools.name: settle_vault

mcp_tools.description: Approve the vault to pull underlying tokens from the Safe (required for redemption settlement).

safe_address.title: Safe Address

underlying_token.description: Address of the underlying ERC20 token
underlying_token.title: Underlying Token

inputSchema.title: ApproveVaultUnderlyingRequest

mcp_tools.name: approve_vault_underlying

mcp_tools.description: Deposit underlying tokens into a vault (approve + requestDeposit). Depositor is the EOA.

inputSchema.description: Deposit underlying tokens into a Lagoon vault (approve + requestDeposit).

amount.description: Amount to deposit in raw underlying units (e.g. '10000000' for 10 USDC)
amount.title: Amount

depositor_address.description: Depositor address (defaults to strategy wallet if empty)
depositor_address.title: Depositor Address

underlying_token.description: Address of the vault's underlying token (e.g. USDC address)
underlying_token.title: Underlying Token

inputSchema.title: DepositVaultRequest

mcp_tools.name: deposit_vault

inputSchema.title: TeardownVaultRequest

mcp_tools.name: teardown_vault

mcp_tools.description: Wrap native tokens to their ERC-20 equivalent (e.g. ETH -> WETH, MATIC -> WMATIC). Required before LP operations when wallet holds native tokens. Supports dry_run.

inputSchema.description: Wrap native tokens to their ERC-20 equivalent (e.g. ETH -> WETH, MATIC -> WMATIC).

amount.description: Amount of native token to wrap as a decimal string, or 'all'
amount.title: Amount

inputSchema.title: WrapNativeRequest

mcp_tools.name: wrap_native

mcp_tools.description: Get a complete wallet balance overview in a single call. Automatically queries common tokens for the chain, filters dust, and returns total USD value. Use instead of multiple get_balance calls.

inputSchema.description:
Get a complete wallet balance overview in a single call.

Automatically queries all common tokens for the chain (ETH, WETH, USDC, USDT, etc.)
plus any additional tokens specified. Filters out dust balances below min_balance_usd.

extra_tokens.description: Additional token symbols to query beyond the default set
extra_tokens.title: Extra Tokens

min_balance_usd.description: Minimum USD balance to include (filters dust)
min_balance_usd.title: Min Balance Usd

wallet_address.description: Wallet to query. Defaults to strategy wallet.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

inputSchema.title: GetWalletOverviewRequest

mcp_tools.name: get_wallet_overview

mcp_tools.description: Check whether the SDK supports a given protocol on a given chain. Returns supported actions, recommended strategy template, and chain availability. No network calls — uses static registry.

inputSchema.description:
Check whether the SDK supports a given protocol on a given chain.

Returns supported actions, recommended strategy template, and known issues.
Uses static SDK registry data — no network calls needed.

chain.description: Chain to check (e.g. 'arbitrum'). If empty, returns all chains.
chain.title: Chain

inputSchema.title: CheckProtocolSupportRequest

mcp_tools.name: check_protocol_support

inputSchema.description: Persist agent/strategy state.

deployment_id.description: Deployment identifier; uses default if empty
deployment_id.title: Deployment Id

inputSchema.title: SaveAgentStateRequest

mcp_tools.name: save_agent_state

mcp_tools.description: Load previously saved agent/strategy state.

inputSchema.description: Load previously saved state.

deployment_id.description: Deployment identifier; uses default if empty
deployment_id.title: Deployment Id

inputSchema.title: LoadAgentStateRequest

mcp_tools.name: load_agent_state

mcp_tools.description: Record an agent decision summary and tool call log for audit trail.

inputSchema.description: Record an agent decision for audit trail.

decision_summary.description: What the agent decided and why
decision_summary.title: Decision Summary

tool_calls.description: Tool calls made during this decision
tool_calls.title: Tool Calls

inputSchema.title: RecordAgentDecisionRequest

mcp_tools.name: record_agent_decision

function.description: Deploy a new Lagoon vault via factory contract. Returns the vault address on success.
function.name: deploy_vault

parameters.description: Deploy a new Lagoon vault via factory contract.

admin_address.description: Admin address for vault governance (usually same as safe)

deployer_address.description: EOA address that signs the factory deploy tx
deployer_address.title: Deployer Address

underlying_token_address.description: Address of the vault's underlying token (e.g. USDC)
underlying_token_address.title: Underlying Token Address

valuation_manager_address.description: Address that can propose vault valuations (defaults to admin_address)
valuation_manager_address.title: Valuation Manager Address

function.description: Read current state of a Lagoon vault: total assets, pending deposits/redeems, share price.
function.name: get_vault_state

function.description: Run a vault settlement cycle: propose new valuation, settle deposits and redeems.
function.name: settle_vault

parameters.description: Run a vault settlement cycle (propose + settle deposits/redeems).

new_total_assets.description: Override NAV in raw underlying units; auto-computed if omitted
new_total_assets.title: New Total Assets

parameters.title: SettleVaultRequest

function.description: Approve the vault to pull underlying tokens from the Safe (required for redemption settlement).

safe_address.description: Safe wallet address that holds the underlying tokens
safe_address.title: Safe Address

underlying_token.description: Address of the underlying ERC20 token
underlying_token.title: Underlying Token

function.description: Deposit underlying tokens into a vault (approve + requestDeposit). Depositor is the EOA.
function.name: deposit_vault

parameters.description: Deposit underlying tokens into a Lagoon vault (approve + requestDeposit).

amount.description: Amount to deposit in raw underlying units (e.g. '10000000' for 10 USDC)
amount.title: Amount

depositor_address.description: Depositor address (defaults to strategy wallet if empty)
depositor_address.title: Depositor Address

underlying_token.description: Address of the vault's underlying token (e.g. USDC address)
underlying_token.title: Underlying Token

function.description: Initiate a deterministic vault teardown: close all LP positions, swap to underlying, run final settlement.

function.description: Wrap native tokens to their ERC-20 equivalent (e.g. ETH -> WETH, MATIC -> WMATIC). Required before LP operations when wallet holds native tokens. Supports dry_run.
function.name: wrap_native

parameters.description: Wrap native tokens to their ERC-20 equivalent (e.g. ETH -> WETH, MATIC -> WMATIC).

amount.description: Amount of native token to wrap as a decimal string, or 'all'
amount.title: Amount

function.description: Get a complete wallet balance overview in a single call. Automatically queries common tokens for the chain, filters dust, and returns total USD value. Use instead of multiple get_balance calls.
function.name: get_wallet_overview

parameters.description:
Get a complete wallet balance overview in a single call.

Automatically queries all common tokens for the chain (ETH, WETH, USDC, USDT, etc.)
plus any additional tokens specified. Filters out dust balances below min_balance_usd.

extra_tokens.description: Additional token symbols to query beyond the default set
extra_tokens.title: Extra Tokens

min_balance_usd.description: Minimum USD balance to include (filters dust)
min_balance_usd.title: Min Balance Usd

wallet_address.description: Wallet to query. Defaults to strategy wallet.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

parameters.title: GetWalletOverviewRequest

function.description: Check whether the SDK supports a given protocol on a given chain. Returns supported actions, recommended strategy template, and chain availability. No network calls — uses static registry.
function.name: check_protocol_support

parameters.description:
Check whether the SDK supports a given protocol on a given chain.

Returns supported actions, recommended strategy template, and known issues.
Uses static SDK registry data — no network calls needed.

chain.description: Chain to check (e.g. 'arbitrum'). If empty, returns all chains.
chain.title: Chain

parameters.title: CheckProtocolSupportRequest
